scripts.db:test:create: docker exec excuse-postgres psql -U excuse -d excuse -c 'CREATE DATABASE excuse_test OWNER excuse;'
scripts.db:test:reset: docker exec excuse-postgres psql -U excuse -d excuse -c 'DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS excuse_test;' && docker exec excuse-postgres psql -U excuse -d excuse -c 'CREATE DATABASE excuse_test OWNER excuse;'
